reference: Hi, I care about your concern. In the case of a superficial scratch, it is advisable to get the anti-rabies vaccine, completing three doses. The vaccine should be administered on the zero, third, and seventh days from the day of exposure to the animal. I hope I have answered your question. If you have any further questions, I will be happy to help.
